notes: PRISM Alignment Dataset (Kirk et al., arXiv:2404.16019). Participatory alignment dataset with 1,500 diverse participants from 75 countries, 8,011 conversations, and 68,374 utterances. Includes survey/self-description metadata, stated preferences for LLM behavior, conversation prompts/history, ratings, open feedback, and safety/privacy metadata. Dataset card notes human-written text is released under CC-BY-4.0 and model responses under CC-BY-NC-4.0.
